title: rubus × thermarum
intro: Rubus × thermarum, a hybrid of the raspberry and blackberry species, is a type of bramble plant native to the island of Java in Indonesia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with Rubus × thermarum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
